description: User clicked the 'Save these preferences' toggle switch to enable it.
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the toggle switch, which changes from grey to blue as a modal appears.

description: A 'Remember Preferences' informational modal appeared after the user enabled the toggle.
frame_description: A white modal overlay appears on the screen with the title 'Remember Preferences'.

description: User clicked the close button (X) on the 'Remember Preferences' modal.
frame_description: The cursor is over the 'X' icon in the top right of the modal, and the modal begins to fade out in the next frame.

description: User clicked the 'Save these preferences' toggle switch again to disable it.
frame_description: The cursor clicks the blue toggle, which then returns to a grey (off) state.

description: User scrolled the page vertically to reveal the 'Short tasks & surveys' section.
frame_description: The cards on the screen shift upwards, bringing a new section into view at the top.

description: User scrolled horizontally through the 'Short tasks & surveys' card carousel.
frame_description: The horizontal list of task cards shifts to the left, showing different opportunities.
